'''Larka Nimondro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hobor]] and the daughter of [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Nimondro]] who led the species. She was in love with [[Ket Krax]], and was framed for his murder by [[Jake Harthan]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]'' {{1st}}
